item.title: No more power point by hand — automate PPT creation by R Officer
item.description: As a data scientist, you draw insights from data and present it in a informative and visually appealing way. There are good tools (Tableau, Looker, Power BI) to help you tell the story, while what if your boss prefers PowerPoint? It is not hard to make PowerPoint, but it takes time and effort. You must be patient enough to adjust each font size and make sure all elements aligned. Besides, you must get very good stamina, if your PowerPoint is 100 pages.

About Me Hi! There must be a reason that you visit this site. Guess you want to know more about me? I am Wenxuan Zhang, a data scientist specializes in marketing analytics and revenue management. I love crunching numbers and figuring out what they are trying to tell us (hopefully). I am passionate about anything that could increase ROI or productivity overall. After graduating from Columbia University in the city of New York with M.
